She always hated that I acted the way I: She always hated that I acted the way I did, and I never understood until now.
She... She saw me as her own son, I thin: She... She saw me as her own son, I think. And I feel so stupid for not realizing it then.
What moments could we have shared if I r: What moments could we have shared if I realized she cared about me more than I thought?
AELITA: Well... You're making up for it: AELITA: Well... You're making up for it right now!
AELITA: As for me, I've been meditating: AELITA: As for me, I've been meditating a lot more lately.

Nastasia's been helping me with making a: Nastasia's been helping me with making a firewall so something like that can't happen again.

I can eat, but the food tastes washed ou: I can eat, but the food tastes washed out. I feel with my hands, but even that feels wrong.

How does one deal with turning to stone?: How does one deal with turning to stone? I dunno...

But life is <i>about</i> making mistakes: But life is about making mistakes and learning from them.
Every single person in this Café has mad: Every single person in this Café has made a whole slew of mistakes, and they have a bunch of regrets.
Of course, comparing pain and trauma is: Of course, comparing pain and trauma is irresponsible, but it's still worth noting that these experiences shape who you are.
You'll stunt your growth even more if yo: You'll stunt your growth even more if you hyperfix on all the things you've done wrong.
VENAM: Yeah, I guess you're right. It's: VENAM: Yeah, I guess you're right. It's just intrusive thoughts, probably.

Meetings like this even reassure me that: Meetings like this even reassure me that I want to have more good times with you guys like this.

So that wasn't very nice to hear.

And we need to disperse before our final: And we need to disperse before our final "friend" arrives.

CRESCENT: So it seems I was set up.
Perhaps I deserved this one. I will over: Perhaps I deserved this one. I will overlook it then.
CRESCENT: I'm not trying to make this aw: CRESCENT: I'm not trying to make this awkward, I just don't have much to say.
I haven't had a casual conversation in q: I haven't had a casual conversation in quite some time.
CRESCENT: I see... Well, I haven't done: CRESCENT: I see... Well, I haven't done anything for the past couple of days.
I haven't had motivation to do anything. Everything I worked for was shot down.
I was wondering lately... If I even have: I was wondering lately... If I even have a reason to live anymore.
But the last thing my friends told me... I have to "move on" and live for myself.
Thinking on that... Is that not unreason: Thinking on that... Is that not unreasonable?
To move on, I mean... How can I move on: To move on, I mean... How can I move on when the person I love is still here with me.
They have the same face, and the same vo: They have the same face, and the same voice...
But yet, the mannerisms, the movements,: But yet, the mannerisms, the movements, the behavior is all wrong.
Truly, a doppleganger of the fallen. How: Truly, a doppleganger of the fallen. How is this any fair to me?\|
CRESCENT: At least you agree. Not that I: CRESCENT: At least you agree. Not that I was asking you to.
It's not like it was your fault you're i: It's not like it was your fault you're in that body. I can't be mad at you for that.
CRESCENT: There's nothing to be sorry ab: CRESCENT: There's nothing to be sorry about.
It was their decision to leave their bod: It was their decision to leave their body for you, not yours.
I can't be mad at you for that-- Even if: I can't be mad at you for that-- Even if I was just a few days ago.
No, the unending vial of hatred and rage: No, the unending vial of hatred and rage I've had for this world is gone.
But in its stead, I have found a vat of: But in its stead, I have found a vat of nothingness which I cannot comprehend.
A feeling of emptiness that I know all t: A feeling of emptiness that I know all too well, yet cannot be more foreign.
Right, well, I assume this isn't the onl: Right, well, I assume this isn't the only destination we have for today.

Yeah, I'll take a dark roast...
Mommy said I can't have coffee so I get: Mommy said I can't have coffee so I get some just to make her cry.
We don't really have a place like this b: We don't really have a place like this back in Kristiline. It's nice.
